import React, { useEffect } from "react"; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Brain, Heart, Star } from "lucide-react"; export default function SplashScreen() { const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { const timer = setTimeout(() => { navigate('/landing'); }, 3000); // 3 seconds loading time return () => clearTimeout(timer); }, [navigate]); return (
{/* Loading indicator */}
); }
